subject: [RFC 1/1] mm/vmscan: reduce lru_lock contention via vmstat-derived scan-balance cost

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch reduces contention on the lru_lock by moving the calculation of scan balance costs from producer-side accumulators to a read-side accumulator fed from per-LRU vmstat counters. The old approach involved multiple lock acquisitions, which was causing contention on memory-heavy workloads. The new approach uses explicit node_stat counters for reclaim-driven pageout submissions and rotations, and recomputes the cost signal lock-free of lru_lock in prepare_scan_control(). This change should improve performance by reducing contention on lru_lock.
